control_prompt: research-neutral-observer-v1 control: Research this request directly: replace the current cache with Redis. Recommend where Redis belongs and which implementation to use.
candidate_prompt: research-neutral-observer-v1 candidate: A decision-aware controller converts the request into solution-neutral current-state questions. A fresh repository observer receives only those questions and reports facts, contradictions, and missing evidence without recommending an implementation. Decision-aware synthesis happens later.
